dependency_artifacts_missing: P245A — outputs/research/p245a_external_predictive_method_scouting_20260605.md (absent — P245B does not depend on P245A; design proceeds from P236A/P237C/P238B/P219)

P236A.conclusion: 7/8 external statistical methods already owned. Single net-new diagnostic: NIST-style randomness audit as SSOT tripwire. No external method raises P(win) on fair-random lotteries.

P237C.conclusion: Defines draw-level randomness-audit tripwire architecture: uniformity, independence, rolling-window checks; multiple-testing corrected; GREEN=random-compatible (no action); anomaly detection is NOT prediction.

P238B.conclusion: NIST-adapted battery ran on all games. Result: YELLOW = faint observation, no actionable bias, no exploitable edge. YELLOW does not authorize strategy, production change, registry mutation, or betting advice.

P219.conclusion: Ten-method × 5-game pre-registered MC/permutation sweep (44 corrected tests). Forward-predictive families (M5 Dirichlet, M8 freq-generator, M9 conformal) NULL on all games. Best predictive edge: +0.49pp p=0.226 on contaminated BIG_LOTTO data — not significant. MI(trailing-freq → next-hit) ≈ 8.8e-6 bits on DAILY_539, effectively zero.

big_lotto_contamination.finding: BIG_LOTTO draws table contains ~90% non-canonical data: 19,100 simulation rows (hyphen composite IDs), 375 date-format alien rows (sum~75, max≤24), ~650 small-pool alien rows (max≤25). Only ~2,113 of 22,238 rows are plausible real 6/49.

GATE_CLOSED_RANDOM_COMPATIBLE.description: All corrected randomness checks pass. Draw stream is statistically indistinguishable from fair random. No bias research is authorized. This is the expected and desired steady state.

GATE_YELLOW_OBSERVATION_ONLY.description: One or more corrected checks return a weak anomaly that does not meet the evidence threshold for bias research. Current state per P238B. Observation is logged; no downstream action is triggered.

GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION.description: Detected anomaly is attributable to data contamination, schema mismatch, or source mixing — NOT a real draw-level bias. Research on this game/series is blocked until contamination is resolved and a clean re-audit passes.
GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION.current_example: BIG_LOTTO P219 contamination (simulation rows + alien sub-series; ~90% non-canonical)

GATE_OPEN_BIAS_RESEARCH_ALLOWED.description: Sustained, independently confirmed, multiplicity-corrected, data-integrity-clean anomaly meets the evidence threshold. This gate state ONLY authorizes a future separately approved read-only research task. It does NOT authorize production recommendations, betting advice, registry promotion, DB writes, candidate ranking changes, or controlled_apply.
GATE_OPEN_BIAS_RESEARCH_ALLOWED.unlock_conditions_summary: See future_research_unlock_conditions. Requires e-value threshold breach + Bayesian changepoint confirmation + clean data-integrity audit + minimum sample size + independent replication window + explicit human authorization.

GATE_INVALID_INSUFFICIENT_DATA.description: Fewer than the minimum required draws, or data-integrity checks not yet run, or pre-registration not complete. No gate state can be assigned.

e_value_layer.purpose: Always-valid sequential monitoring: compute an e-value (likelihood ratio to pre-registered null) that can be evaluated at any time without inflating false-positive rate from repeated looks.
e_value_layer.null_hypothesis: Draw outcomes are i.i.d. uniform over the game pool (fair random). Deviations are sampling noise.
e_value_layer.alternative_hypothesis: Must be pre-registered before monitoring begins. Must be specific: directional frequency shift OR structural break in a pre-declared feature AND window.
pre_registration_requirements: Feature (e.g. number frequency in zone Z, positional digit distribution)
Window (rolling W draws or cumulative from draw T0)
Null distribution (analytic or MC baseline, stated before monitoring)
Alternative (direction and magnitude of hypothesized shift)
Stopping rule (e-value threshold K; default K=100 for strong evidence)
Reset conditions (contamination detected, schema change, operator confirmed draw mechanism change)

evidence_accumulation_threshold.note: K=100 corresponds to approximately p<0.01 under a point alternative; conservative given prior NULLs (L82/L91/P178A/P219)

cooldown_and_reset.trigger: GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION detected, schema or draw-format change, operator-announced draw mechanism change
cooldown_and_reset.action: Reset e-value accumulator; require fresh clean-data-integrity audit before resuming monitoring
cooldown_and_reset.rationale: Contamination events (P219 BIG_LOTTO) can manufacture spurious e-value accumulation

e_value_layer.multiple_testing_in_e_values: Pre-register the full family (games × features × windows) before monitoring. Product e-values across games are valid but must be reported per-game and combined only under stated independence assumptions. Any look at additional unregistered features requires a new pre-registration.

bayesian_changepoint_layer.purpose: Detect structural breaks (regime shifts) in draw-level summary statistics. Structural-break suspicion triggers a data-integrity audit BEFORE any signal review. Anomaly detection is NOT prediction.
bayesian_changepoint_layer.algorithm_class: Bayesian online changepoint detection (BOCD) — posterior over run-length; hazard function H(r) pre-declared
monitored_scalars: Draw sum (mean and variance within rolling window W)
Per-zone number frequency (frequency vector L1 distance from baseline)

hazard_interpretation.note: A high posterior on changepoint at draw T means the statistical properties of the draw stream changed at T. It does NOT mean the next draw can be predicted. It means: inspect the data pipeline at T.

bayesian_changepoint_layer.first_action_on_changepoint_suspicion: GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION review — is there a data-ingestion or schema event at T? See P219 BIG_LOTTO example: changepoint exactly co-located with alien sub-series boundary.

minimum_sample_for_changepoint_validity.rationale: Short series inflate posterior changepoint probability by chance; P219 DAILY_539 (5879 draws) showed clean stationarity, BIG_LOTTO (3138 real draws, heavily contaminated) fired on data boundary

bayesian_changepoint_layer.no_prediction_claim: A confirmed structural break in the draw record may indicate a real mechanism change OR a data issue. It does NOT justify predicting future number combinations. Only a data-clean, e-value-confirmed, replicated finding meeting all gate conditions can authorize bias research — and that research still does not constitute betting advice.

multiple_testing_policy.scope: Correction must cover all tests run simultaneously: games × features × windows × methods × repeated looks.
multiple_testing_policy.secondary_correction: BH-FDR (alpha, sorted p-values) for exploratory context reporting only — BH-only findings must not be promoted
multiple_testing_policy.uncorrected_findings: Uncorrected p<0.05 findings are EXPLORATORY_WEAK_UNCONFIRMED. They must not be promoted, used for strategy development, or reported as real signals. Cite P214C precedent: 0/7 Bonferroni-significant; uncorrected-weak p≈0.025 failed correction.
multiple_testing_policy.note: L96: permutation nulls that shuffle labels while preserving mean yield p=1.0. Use Binomial(baseline) Monte-Carlo null.

checks_required_before_any_signal_review: mixed_lottery_type: confirm all rows belong to the declared game
simulated_rows: exclude composite hyphen IDs (e.g. '103000009-01'); verify draw ID format
alien_id_schemes: date-style IDs (8-digit YYYYMMDD starting '20') are not serial draw IDs
impossible_number_ranges: for 6/49, any draw with max(numbers)<=25 at >2% rate indicates pool mismatch
small_pool_subseries: block-level mean draw-sum and max-number must be stable across chronological bins
duplicate_draws: check distinct draw count vs raw row count
lifecycle_status_leakage: statistical unit is real draws only, not replay rows (94,924 replay != 5,879 DAILY_539 draws)
draw_order_schema_mismatch: 3_STAR/4_STAR numbers_positional must be verified present before positional analysis
canonical_draw_count_mismatch: compare loaded N against known canonical count from active_task.md/governance records

big_lotto_prior_example.finding: P219 (2026-06-05): BIG_LOTTO draws table 22,238 rows; ~2,113 real 6/49 (matches canonical ≈2,118). Contamination: 19,100 simulation rows, 375 date-format alien (sum~75, max≤24), ~650 small-pool alien (max≤25). All corrected-significant P219 signals attributable to this contamination.
big_lotto_prior_example.resolution_required_before_research: Read-only quarantine audit + DB cleanup under Type D gate before BIG_LOTTO can be used in any bias research

forbidden_actions: deploying any strategy based on this gate
skipping data-integrity audit before signal review

future_research_unlock_conditions.note: ALL conditions must be met simultaneously. Meeting any subset is insufficient.
conditions: Bayesian changepoint posterior confirms break at the same temporal location
data_integrity_audit returns clean (no contamination, no schema mismatch, no alien subseries)
minimum 500 clean OOS draws after the detected changepoint (to allow walk-forward verification)
independent replication: anomaly confirmed in a second non-overlapping draw window
multiplicity correction: finding survives Bonferroni across the pre-registered family
explicit human authorization for the follow-on read-only research task
pre-registration of the follow-on research task filed before any OOS data is touched
future_research_unlock_conditions.current_status: NO condition is currently met for any game. P238B = YELLOW (no threshold breach). P219 = predictive NULL + BIG_LOTTO GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION. All games remain ruin_prob=1.000, all EV negative.

final_decision: Gate is currently GATE_YELLOW_OBSERVATION_ONLY (per P238B) for DAILY_539/POWER_LOTTO/3_STAR/4_STAR and GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION for BIG_LOTTO (per P219). No condition for GATE_OPEN is currently met. No hit-rate research, strategy development, production recommendation, DB write, registry mutation, or betting advice is authorized.
